description_long: This humanoid robot features a mechanical, skeletal frame with exposed joints and intricate detailing throughout its body. Its head is compact and angular, with multiple circular elements that resemble sensors or cameras, and it lacks any traditional facial features. The arms and legs are elongated and segmented, with visible mechanical joints and tubing, giving it a highly articulated and industrial appearance. The torso is reinforced with structural components and appears to house several internal mechanisms, possibly for power or control. The hands and feet are broad and flat, each with multiple articulated segments, suggesting dexterity and stability. The overall color scheme is dominated by dark metallic tones with some orange highlights, emphasizing its utilitarian, robotic design.
description: A dark, skeletal humanoid robot with exposed joints, mechanical limbs, and a compact, sensor-laden head. Its industrial design features articulated arms and legs, broad hands and feet, and orange accent details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's symmetrical, outstretched arms, broad hands, and detailed torso with visible mechanical components.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the robot's slim profile, segmented limbs, and the protruding structure of its head and chest.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, torso, and legs, with visible mechanical linkages and orange highlights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first, showing the robot's articulated joints and the depth of its mechanical structure.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; only integrated mechanical panels and exposed structural elements are visible.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of multiple circular sensor-like elements, lacking a mouth or nose, with no expressive features or display screens.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints, with articulated fingers and toes; limbs appear highly flexible and capable of a wide range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Multiple camera-like sensors visible on the head; no other sensors are clearly visible.
